title: bulbophyllum alatum
intro: Bulbophyllum alatum is an epiphytic orchid species native to Madagascar, characterized by its unique winged pseudobulbs and inflorescences that bloom with yellow flowers. Traditionally, Bulbophyllum alatum has been used in folk medicine, and it is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Bulbophyllum alatum is sometimes used in herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
